title: Ultimate Enchantment
description:
an enchantment mod that provide 10+ powerful and useful enchantments。
The inspiration for ultimate enchantment comes from hypixel skyblock.
body:
it add 10+ enchantments.

Added Ultimate Enchanting and Legendary Enchanting.

a item can only have one Ultimate Enchantment.

The first three Ultimate Enchants:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a88a308c36574ac17f52bbf02d67738dce75f84.png)

ultimate can obtain by kill ender dragon

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e8bd4ef73b70cca2b8751d8c4f7676b48c4eb52.png)

legend can obtain by kill wither

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/736b83e5f6b52a2ad8e857596665a95a884f7244.png)

last stand can obtain ky kill warden

all enchantment:

(i think mending is very powerfull so i add it to legendary enchantment)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41100db677a5c1c9d78220debe7defe9a3878380.png)

ApothicEnchantingAddition:

(it only have tow now)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e82b9838bdc476b63046449eb16060971cc761.png)

for modPack maker:

add ultimate_enchantment:ultimate_enchantment tag to you enchantment can make it a ultimate enchantment

add ultimate_enchantment:legendary_enchantment tag to you enchantment can make it a legendary enchantment

I encourage the author of the integration package to modify most of the enchantments in this mod so that they can only be obtained through certain methods other than the enchantment table
